files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 class Mcporter < Formula
   desc "Model Context Protocol runtime and CLI generator"
   homepage "https://github.com/steipete/mcporter"
-  url "https://github.com/steipete/mcporter/releases/download/v0.8.0/mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.8.0.tar.gz"
-  sha256 "81c093704e1f0f247f14f2fa7ff0e8206227f9d44d6b8ff4bbd839941d083475"
+  url "https://github.com/steipete/mcporter/releases/download/v0.8.1/mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.8.1.tar.gz"
+  sha256 "7f726f70801bdded163699b53fade8b602c18f0dbc07851ce5ddad8e0e8bcb3b"
   license "MIT"
 
   depends_on arch: :arm64

@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ brew install --cask steipete/tap/<name>
 - `gogcli` — Google CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Contacts
 - `gifgrep` — Grep the GIF. Stick the landing.
 - `imsg` — Send and read iMessage / SMS from the terminal
-- `mcporter` — Model Context Protocol runtime and CLI generator (`0.8.0`: stronger OAuth handling, valid JSON fallbacks, richer generated CLI/object flag support)
+- `mcporter` — Model Context Protocol runtime and CLI generator (`0.8.1`: Homebrew/Bun builds report the real version, npm package contents trimmed to shipped files only)
 - `oracle` — Bundle prompts + files for second-model review
 - `ordercli` — Multi-provider order CLI (Foodora, Deliveroo)
 - `peekaboo` — Lightning-fast macOS screenshots & AI vision analysis
